description: Legal document. Location: Ṣahrajt. Dated: Monday, 11 Kislev 1372 Seleucid, which is 1060 CE. Ḥarīza b. Abraham appoints Mevorakh b. Abraham (most likely her brother) as her agent to receive a bill of divorce from her husband Ṣadaqa b. Ṭayyib. Written and signed by Yehuda b. Avraham, who also wrote T-S 13J13.2 and ENA 2465.8–9. Also signed by: Ḥalfon b. Shelomo; Ṣadaqa b. Furqān. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
